title: SmartChunkerOutput
description: Schema for Pass 0: Smart Chunker output - logical topic extraction from markdown

source_topic.description: The main subject matter of the provided text

topics.description: List of logical sub-topics extracted from the text

topic_id.description: Unique identifier for this topic (e.g., t1, t2)

concept_type.description: The primary nature of this chunk

source_blocks.description: The IDs of the raw markdown blocks used for this chunk

key_terms.description: Key vocabulary terms in this topic

has_formula.description: Whether this topic contains mathematical formulas

suggested_renderer.description: remotion=text/simple images, manim=math/physics/complex logic, video=biological/real-world processes
